tools.description: List the apps on this computer. Returns the set of apps that are currently running, as well as any that have been used in the last 14 days, including details on usage frequency
tools.name: list_apps

tools.description: Start an app use session if needed, then get the state of the app's key window and return a screenshot and accessibility tree. This must be called once per assistant turn before interacting with the app

app.description: App name, full app path, or unambiguous bundle identifier

tools.name: get_app_state

tools.description: Click an element by index or pixel coordinates from screenshot

app.description: App name, full app path, or unambiguous bundle identifier

mouse_button.description: Mouse button to click. Defaults to left.

x.description: X coordinate in screenshot pixel coordinates

y.description: Y coordinate in screenshot pixel coordinates

tools.name: click

tools.description: Invoke a secondary accessibility action exposed by an element

app.description: App name, full app path, or unambiguous bundle identifier

tools.name: perform_secondary_action

tools.description: Set the value of a settable accessibility element

app.description: App name, full app path, or unambiguous bundle identifier

tools.name: set_value

tools.description: Select text inside a text element, or place the text cursor before or after it. Provide text exactly as it appears in the accessibility tree, including any Markdown formatting. If the text is not unique, provide surrounding prefix or suffix text to disambiguate it.

prefix.description: Optional text immediately before the target, used to disambiguate repeated matches

selection.description: Whether to select the text or place the cursor before or after it. Defaults to text.

suffix.description: Optional text immediately after the target, used to disambiguate repeated matches

text.description: Target text as shown in the accessibility tree

tools.name: select_text

tools.description: Scroll an element in a direction by a number of pages

app.description: App name, full app path, or unambiguous bundle identifier

direction.description: Scroll direction: up, down, left, or right

pages.description: Number of pages to scroll. Fractional values are supported. Defaults to 1

tools.name: scroll

tools.description: Drag from one point to another using pixel coordinates

app.description: App name, full app path, or unambiguous bundle identifier

tools.name: drag

tools.description:
Press a key or key-combination on the keyboard, including modifier and navigation keys.
  - This supports xdotool's `key` syntax.
  - Examples: "a", "Return", "Tab", "super+c", "Up", "KP_0" (for the numpad 0 key).

key.description: Key or key combination to press
